profile.name: VanEck Gold Miners ETF
profile.description: VanEck Gold Miners ETF is an exchange-traded fund that provides investors with targeted exposure to the global gold mining industry. It seeks to replicate the performance of the MarketVector Global Gold Miners Index, which tracks companies primarily involved in gold mining, as well as silver mining, royalties, and streaming activities worldwide. The index selects the largest securities by free-float adjusted market capitalization, covering at least 85% of the industry, with a minimum of 25 holdings, weighted by market cap and capped at 20% per company, while excluding firms from certain restricted countries. The ETF holds a diversified portfolio of large and mid-cap producers from key regions including Canada, the United States, Australia, South Africa, and Brazil, focusing on the materials sector. Managed passively through physical replication, it distributes dividends and offers liquidity as a prominent product in the gold miners category. Founded in 2006 and headquartered in the United States, VanEck Gold Miners ETF serves as a key vehicle for accessing the performance dynamics of precious metals mining equities.
